top_signals.title: Investor Angst Emerges in Riskiest Stocks Even as AI Trade Flies
top_signals.summary: Investors are starting to hedge the risk of a drop in the Russell 2000 Index of smaller companies, despite investors remaining wildly bullish for large-cap stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
